prestart.reminder: Press Play (▶) for di Floating Window when you ready to start. Once di test don start, no press Pause (⏸) until you finish reading: Pause ends di test; e no pause di timer. Press Stop/Reset (⏹) only if you wan cancel di test.

entry.title: Reading speed test
entry.intro:
Dis test go help estimate your real reading speed through guided session. Di app go open di text and wait make you press Play (▶) for di Floating Window when you ready to start. Once di test don start, no press Pause (⏸) until you finish reading: Pause ends di test; e no pause di timer. Use Stop/Reset (⏹) only if you wan cancel di test. After, you fit check comprehension questions if di text get dem and, for di end, create preset from di result.
Before you start, remember say these test texts usually need between 5 and 15 minutes of steady concentration, without interruption.
Dis pool dey use short texts, so take di result with care. No use am directly judge long texts, where good factors like flow and context build-up, and bad factors like mental recap and tiredness, usually dey matter.
entry.pool_exhausted_message: No unused test files remain. Reset di pool or add more files.
entry.start_random_confirm: Dis go overwrite di current text with random eligible text from di pool. You wan continue?
entry.reset_confirm: Dis go reset di whole test pool and mark all files as unused again. You wan continue?

questions.title: Reading comprehension questions
questions.intro: Answering these reading comprehension questions na optional and e no affect your final score. Dem only dey help you check di text difficulty and whether your reading pace and style let you reach basic comprehension. Your answers no dey saved or sent to di developers or anybody else.
questions.random_value: Expected score if person guess at random: {percentage}
questions.incomplete_warning: You must answer all questions before evaluation.
questions.chance_at_least_observed: Chance to get at least dis score by random guessing: {percentage}

alerts.text_extraction_apply_too_large: Di resulting text too large to process. Reduce repetitions and try again.
alerts.text_extraction_apply_text_limit: Cannot append extracted text: maximum size don reach.
alerts.text_extraction_apply_truncated: Applied extracted text pass limit and dem truncate am.
alerts.text_extraction_prepare_invalid: Di prepared text extraction request no valid again. Start di flow again.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_unavailable: OCR no dey available. Check setup/auth status and try again.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_activation_required: OCR activation dey required. Sign in to Google OCR and try again.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_activation_disclosur: toT dey use Google services for OCR. If you continue, your browser go open make you authorize dis app.
Only files wey you choose for OCR go dey sent to Google.
Dis app stores app-managed Google OAuth credentials for OCR and local Google token state for dis app instance.
After export, di app go try remove di temporary Google document from your Google Drive.
You fit disconnect later through Preferences > Disconnect Google OCR.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_activation_cancelled: OCR activation was cancelled. Text extraction no continue.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_token_state_invalid: Saved Google OCR sign-in state no valid. Reconnect Google OCR and try again.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_activation_failed: OCR activation fail. Check setup/auth status and try again.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_disconnect_success: Google OCR was disconnected. Di saved Google token was revoked and di local sign-in state was removed.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_disconnect_not_conne: Google OCR no dey connected for dis app instance now.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_disconnect_failed: Google OCR disconnect fail. Di saved sign-in state no removed.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_connectivity_failed: OCR needs internet connection. Check your connection and try again.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_setup_missing_creden: OCR no dey available for dis app build because bundled Google OAuth credentials dey missing.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_setup_invalid_creden: OCR no dey available for dis app build because bundled Google OAuth credentials no valid.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_restricted: OCR route dey restricted for dis file type.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_quota_or_rate_limite: OCR dey temporarily blocked by quota/rate limits. Wait and retry.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_runtime_error: OCR runtime error happen during text extraction. Check console and retry.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_cleanup_warning: OCR finish, but temporary remote file cleanup fail. Check your Google Drive folder.
alerts.text_extraction_ocr_apply_pending: OCR extraction completed. Post-extraction apply flow still pending implementation.
alerts.text_extraction_native_runtime_error: Native extraction runtime error happen during text extraction. Check console and retry.
alerts.text_extraction_native_unreadable_or_cor: Di selected file unreadable or corrupt for native extraction.
alerts.text_extraction_native_encrypted_or_pass: Di selected PDF encrypted or password-protected and no fit extract natively.
alerts.text_extraction_native_unsupported_forma: Dis file format no dey supported by native extraction route.
alerts.text_extraction_native_apply_pending: Native extraction completed. Post-extraction apply flow still pending implementation.
